system_authority.reason: Defines no-code audit behavior and canonical evidence-first retrieval.
Required by the Home Player contract stack and Baseline V2 authority freeze.
Confirms home_player_course_links source truth, backend read composition, read-only runtime_media, and Swedish product text.

key_assertions: Mounted learner Home Player must consume GET /home/audio.
Frontend may consume only media = { media_id, state, resolved_url } | null.
Frontend must not use media_asset_id, storage fields, signed URLs, or alternate runtime endpoints.
Visibility is sourced from app.home_player_uploads and app.home_player_course_links.
Direct uploads require active=true and audio/home_player_audio.
Course links require enabled=true, published course, audio media, and canonical lesson access.
Invalid ready items are filtered before frontend response.
Ready audio playback must resolve from worker-owned derived playback.
Audio playback format for ready assets is MP3-only.
All user-facing product text must be Swedish.
Frontend is render-only for user-facing text.
Missing text authority must fail closed.
Frontend must not resolve or infer media truth.

frontend_mounting_map.behavior: Route access to /home is granted from entryState.canEnterApp. Profile is not part of the router gate.
blocking_conditions: canEnterApp is false because onboarding or payment pre-entry flow still applies

frontend_mounting_map.behavior: HomeAudioSection is mounted inside the dashboard column.
blocking_conditions: authState.profile == null returns AuthBootPage before the dashboard body is built

frontend_mounting_map.behavior: Widget watches homeAudioProvider and switches between loading, error, empty, and populated states.
Controller fetches GET /home/audio and converts payload into HomeAudioState.
Backend returns items plus text_bundle for /home/audio.
Direct uploads require active=true and audio/home_player_audio. Course links require enabled=true, published courses, and audio media only.
Ready items are surfaced only when resolved playback exists and playback_format is mp3.

evidence: frontend/lib/core/env/app_config.dart:5-16 exposes apiBaseUrl, subscriptionsEnabled, stripePublishableKey, and imageLoggingEnabled only.
Repo search found no home_audio/home_player-specific env key, feature flag, or toggle in learner dashboard code.
frontend/lib/main.dart:304-314 mounts only EnvBanner when app-core env keys are missing; it does not suppress the home dashboard widget tree.
The learner dashboard has no AppConfig-based Home Player gate.
backend/app/repositories/home_audio_runtime.py:56-58 requires home_player_course_links.enabled=true, course visibility public, and ma.media_type=audio.
backend/app/services/home_audio_service.py:39-59 and backend/app/services/lesson_playback_service.py:189-203 require ready playback to resolve as MP3.

identified_blockers.title: Dashboard mount is incorrectly gated on profile hydration
identified_blockers.failure_mode: HomeDashboardPage returns AuthBootPage before HomeAudioSection() at home_dashboard_page.dart:99 is built. homeAudioProvider is never watched, HomeAudioController.build() never runs, and /home/audio is never requested.
identified_blockers.contract_impact: Violates the mounted frontend consumer law in home_audio_runtime_contract.md whenever entry-state authorization succeeds but profile hydration is absent or fails.

identified_blockers.title: Text-bundle completeness is a hard render dependency
identified_blockers.state_condition: /home/audio succeeds but omits any required text_bundle entry used by HomeAudioSection
identified_blockers.failure_mode: HomePlayerTextBundle.requireValue throws StateError during widget build. The section cannot render because the frontend is not allowed to invent fallback text.
identified_blockers.contract_impact: Aligned with system_text_authority_contract.md fail-closed text rules, but still a precise learner-dashboard visibility failure point.

identified_blockers.title: Payload contract drift collapses the controller path into an opaque error state
identified_blockers.state_condition: /home/audio emits forbidden runtime fields, invalid JSON shape, or any non-canonical item object
identified_blockers.failure_mode: Repository throws StateError, controller converts it to AppFailure, and the widget renders only the error chrome. Because _backendOwnedHomeAudioMessage requires failure.code, contract-drift failures can degrade to an icon-only error state.
identified_blockers.contract_impact: Frontend correctly refuses forbidden authority, but the learner surface becomes operationally opaque.

identified_blockers.title: Empty Home Player can be caused by backend source truth rather than a frontend mount defect
identified_blockers.state_condition: No row satisfies active/enabled/public/access-ready MP3 visibility rules
identified_blockers.failure_mode: The dashboard mounts and renders HomeAudioSection, but state.items is empty and the learner sees only the empty state.
identified_blockers.contract_impact: This is expected under the contracts and must not be misclassified as a frontend rendering bug.

tests_run.evidence: Current happy-path learner dashboard requests /home/audio and renders ready + processing items.
Backend /home/audio route and contract-shaped payload are green in the targeted suite.

mp3_and_audio_only_evidence: backend/app/repositories/home_audio_runtime.py:24-26 and 56-58 restrict Home Player source rows to audio media only.
backend/app/services/lesson_playback_service.py:189-203 rejects ready audio unless playback_format == mp3.
backend/tests/test_home_audio_feed.py:546-558 asserts ready /home/audio items resolve to a .mp3 URL.
backend/tests/test_home_audio_runtime_db_integration.py:541-544 and 550-553 create ready Home Player assets with derived .mp3 paths.
audit_verification.current_frontend_truth: The learner dashboard chain is implemented and passes its happy-path tests. The primary remaining frontend defect is the profile-null mount gate.

dependency_spine: HP-DASH-001 unlocks widget instantiation and repository invocation.

tasks.title: Release learner dashboard mount from profile hydration
scope: Remove the profile-null short-circuit that returns AuthBootPage from HomeDashboardPage after routeSession.canEnterApp already granted access.
Keep learner dashboard access aligned to entryState/route session authority, not profile hydration timing.
Preserve render-only Home Player behavior and avoid introducing local text or alternate runtime endpoints.
expected_outcome: An authorized learner dashboard instantiates HomeAudioSection even when authState.profile is still null.
Repository invocation is no longer blocked by unrelated profile hydration.
The learner Home Player obeys the canonical /home/audio mount law under all canEnterApp states.
verification_steps: Add a widget regression that sets entryState.canEnterApp=true with profile=null and proves /home/audio is requested.
Verify the dashboard still redirects away from /home when canEnterApp=false.
Confirm no alternate endpoint or local cache model is introduced while removing the profile gate.
tasks.go_condition: GO when /home/audio is requested for an authorized learner dashboard regardless of profile hydration timing.
tasks.blocked_condition: BLOCKED if HomeDashboardPage can still return AuthBootPage solely because profile is null after app entry is already authorized.

tasks.title: Add learner dashboard mount regressions for authorized profile-null state
scope: Capture the exact route and auth state that previously suppressed Home Player mounting.
Extend learner dashboard tests so future regressions cannot silently reintroduce the profile hydration gate.
expected_outcome: Automated coverage proves the mounted learner dashboard requests /home/audio under the exact authorized-but-profile-null state that currently fails.
The regression suite distinguishes route authorization from profile hydration.
verification_steps: Add a dashboard test with AuthState(entryState=canEnterApp true, profile=null) and assert one GET /home/audio request.
Retain the current happy-path test that renders ready and processing items.
Confirm test fixtures do not rely on any alternate Home Player endpoint.
tasks.go_condition: GO when the test suite would fail immediately if Home Player mounting becomes profile-dependent again.
tasks.blocked_condition: BLOCKED if the regression suite still models HomeDashboardPage only with profile pre-hydrated.

tasks.title: Harden learner runtime payload admission and diagnostic visibility
scope: Keep the frontend fail-closed on forbidden runtime/storage authority while making the failure mode deterministic and traceable.
Verify that HomeAudioSection never mistakes payload contract drift for a successful empty state.
Respect system text authority by avoiding frontend-authored fallback copy.
expected_outcome: Missing or incomplete text_bundle remains a hard contract failure and is covered by explicit verification rather than being misread as a frontend omission.
Learner error rendering remains contract-safe and diagnosable.
verification_steps: Add repository or widget tests for missing required text ids and forbidden runtime fields.
Assert that payload drift enters an explicit error state and never falls through to the empty-state path.
Search the learner Home Player surface for any frontend-authored error/status fallback text before closing the node.
tasks.go_condition: GO when contract drift is surfaced as deterministic failure and not as invisible disappearance or false empty success.
tasks.blocked_condition: BLOCKED if payload drift can still collapse into an undiagnosed blank section or if the remediation introduces frontend-owned copy.

tasks.title: Verify source-state visibility and MP3-ready runtime truth
scope: Distinguish frontend mount issues from backend/source-truth emptiness.
Verify that target data satisfies the canonical visibility gates required for at least one learner-visible Home Player item when the product expectation is non-empty content.
Confirm ready items resolve only from MP3-derived playback.
expected_outcome: The audit can state with evidence whether the learner should see playable Home Player content, a processing row, or only the empty state.
Audio-only and MP3-only runtime law remains intact.
verification_steps: Verify direct uploads and course links satisfy active/enabled/public/access rules before expecting visible items.
Verify at least one ready item resolves to MP3 when target environment is expected to be non-empty.
If target environment has no contract-valid rows, classify the result as source-truth empty state rather than frontend failure.
tasks.go_condition: GO when item visibility expectations are reconciled with canonical source truth and MP3-ready playback evidence.
tasks.blocked_condition: BLOCKED if product expectations require visible items but the source environment has no contract-valid Home Player rows.

tasks.title: Final learner dashboard contract verification
scope: Run the final stop-go verification for the learner-facing Home Player chain from dashboard route through /home/audio payload consumption.
Confirm Swedish user-facing text, frontend render-only media authority, audio-only runtime enforcement, and absence of alternate endpoint or storage authority.
expected_outcome: The learner dashboard visibly mounts Home Player whenever the user is authorized to enter the app.
Data travels only through dashboard -> controller -> repository -> GET /home/audio.
Frontend remains render-only and does not invent playback, state, or text authority.
verification_steps: Run the learner dashboard and repository test suites after the remediation nodes close.
Search the learner Home Player surface for runtime_media, storage_path, playback_object_path, playback_format, signed_url, download_url, and alternate endpoint usage.
Confirm all touched user-facing Home Player text remains Swedish and no prompt surfaces are introduced.
tasks.go_condition: GO when the full learner dashboard chain is mounted, verified, contract-safe, and visibly functional under canonical /home/audio data.
tasks.blocked_condition: BLOCKED if any prior node remains open, the dashboard still depends on profile hydration to mount Home Player, or any non-canonical authority survives.

recommended_next_step_for_each_blocker.next_step: Execute HP-DASH-001 first. This is the only current code-level blocker that prevents HomeAudioSection from ever mounting in an authorized route state.
Execute HP-DASH-003 after the mount fix so missing text authority is covered by explicit tests and cannot masquerade as a frontend omission.
Execute HP-DASH-003 to add deterministic negative-path verification around forbidden fields and non-canonical payloads.
Execute HP-DASH-004 only after the mount path is fixed. If the UI still appears empty, validate source truth rather than continuing frontend work blindly.

final_audit_conclusion.summary: The learner dashboard -> controller -> repository -> /home/audio chain exists and passes the current happy-path tests. The precise current frontend blocker is the profile-null gate in HomeDashboardPage, which suppresses HomeAudioSection even after route authorization has already succeeded.
